title: platanthera longicalcarata var. devolii
intro: Platanthera longicalcarata var. devolii is a variety of orchid native to the United States, specifically in the southern Appalachian Mountains. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Platanthera longicalcarata var. devolii include the potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for various herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
